response.justification: While Bogdan is demonstrably a capable senior software engineer who meets the educational and seniority requirements, his career has been centered on web, backend, and DevOps rather than the specialized hardware architecture domain this role requires. He has no demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, or AI accelerator optimization—all core to the principal-level responsibilities. His recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure does not address the hardware-software co-design specialization and performance-bottleneck analysis needed for this position.
strengths: Proven principal/senior-level engineering maturity across multiple technical domains with diverse language proficiency
Demonstrated ability to optimize systems for high performance and throughput (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby, low-latency async systems)
Current exposure to AI infrastructure and systems-level thinking at re:cinq suggests openness to emerging technical domains
concerns: No background in SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or chip-level architecture—core to the role's technical focus
Career trajectory is software/backend/infrastructure focused; lacks the GPU architecture and AI accelerator optimization specialization required
No evidence of deep neural network training/inference optimization expertise or GPU workload analysis experience

key_factors.factor: Hardware architecture and accelerator optimization expertise
Senior IC technical maturity and delivery track record
Recent AI infrastructure exposure and learning capability
